candidates.title: I/O MAG Snow Goggles | Smith Optics
candidates.snippet: I/O MAG is a spherical snow goggle with interchangeable MAG lenses. It gets our highest level of anti-fog treatment and integrates seamlessly with our helmets.

candidates.title: I/O MAG S Snow Goggles | Smith Optics
candidates.snippet: Whether the day dawns clear or stormy, lens swaps are a snap thanks to our quick-swap MAG lens system. Because no two faces are the same, the I/O MAG S is scaled down to fit smaller faces. Fine tune your kit with additional or replacement goggle lenses for sunny conditions, variable conditions, and cloudy conditions.

candidates.title: I/O MAG XL Snow Goggles | Smith Optics
candidates.snippet: Whether the day dawns clear or stormy, lens swaps are a snap thanks to our quick-swap MAG lens system. Because no two faces are the same, the XL model expands on the standard size for those looking for the largest possible lens. Fine tune your kit with additional or replacement goggle lenses for sunny conditions, variable conditions, and cloudy conditions. Expand your view here. Spherical Carbonic-x lens for distortion-free optics and impact resistance
